# Skill: write-source-list

Produce the numbered source reference table for the report.

## Input

All sources cited anywhere in the report.

## Action

Produce one table row per source.
Every source must include its Intelligence Stack layer assignment.
Flag any source not present in the Stack with ⚠️ Unlisted.

## Output

A table with the following columns:

`| # | Source | Outlet | Stack layer | URL |`
